name: ROI Calculator
description: Industrial-grade ROI calculator based on Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO standards for manufacturing and logistics operations.

inputs.label: Annual Revenue (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual revenue of the facility or business unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual revenue of the facility or business unit.

inputs.label: Operating Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Current operating profit margin as a percentage of revenue.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current operating profit margin as a percentage of revenue.

inputs.label: Total Inventory Value (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Current value of all inventory held (raw materials, WIP, finished goods).

businessContext_i18n.en: Current value of all inventory held (raw materials, WIP, finished goods).

inputs.label: Inventory Carrying Cost (% of inventory value)
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, obsolescence, capital cost). Typical range 20-30%.

label_i18n.en: Inventory Carrying Cost (% of inventory value)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, obsolescence, capital cost). Typical range 20-30%.

inputs.label: Annual Direct Labor Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual cost of direct labor in the operation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual cost of direct labor in the operation.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of products that do not meet quality standards (Six Sigma metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of products that do not meet quality standards (Six Sigma metric).

inputs.label: Cost per Defect (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred per defective unit (rework, scrap, warranty).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost incurred per defective unit (rework, scrap, warranty).

inputs.label: Annual Energy Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual energy expenditure for the facility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual energy expenditure for the facility.

inputs.label: Lean Implementation Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: One-time cost for implementing Lean/Six Sigma improvements (training, tools, consulting).

businessContext_i18n.en: One-time cost for implementing Lean/Six Sigma improvements (training, tools, consulting).

inputs.label: Expected Improvement Factor (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Expected fractional improvement from Lean initiatives (e.g., 0.15 = 15% reduction in waste).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected fractional improvement from Lean initiatives (e.g., 0.15 = 15% reduction in waste).

inputs.label: Industry Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of industrial operation for benchmarking and standard adjustments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of industrial operation for benchmarking and standard adjustments.

inputs.label: ISO 9001 Certified
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the facility is ISO 9001 certified, affecting quality cost baselines.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if the facility is ISO 9001 certified, affecting quality cost baselines.

rules.message: Defect rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Improvement factor must be between 0 and 1.
Annual revenue must be at least $100,000.
ISO 9001 certified facilities typically have defect rates below 3%. Please verify.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds 10% - immediate quality improvement recommended.
Operating margin below 5% - cost reduction initiatives critical.
Inventory value exceeds 30% of annual revenue - potential excess inventory.
